feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How can I pass a value from an input field to a model variable in an SAC story?
entry.content: I created an input field where the user can manually enter a number. I want that number to be passed to a model variable. Is there a way to do this? Thanks in advance.

entry.title: SAC Planning Data
entry.content:
Hi All,

 

Could you please guide me to the planning data that is present in the 

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PCqCXCsDiOg&list=PLs5htBIwERYXDsieiwDtgVgveDHW541oG&index=2

 

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Activate a data action on OnInitialization - SAC
entry.content:
Hello, 

I have a data action in my optimized story that I want to be activated on page initialization.

I expect to see the data action pop-up for parameter entry without clicking on it (it will be hidden) when I enter the page.

what is the code I need?

Thanks

entry.title: how to create a Custom Widget Sankey Chart in SAC?
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to develop a Custom Widget for a Sankey Chart for SAP Analytics Cloud.
I am using reference from this blog but the preexisting on from there does suffice my needs.
I need to modify or develop a new script to render a Node Aligned Sankey .

But with all my own developments or modifications to SAP scripts I am always getting the error : Something went wrong. The system couldn't load the custom widget 'com.sap.sac.sample.echarts.sankeyyg_1.x' (kind: 'main') for this reason: The system took too long to define the custom widget. Please contact your system administrator or the owner of the custom widget. 
and then
Failed to retrieve constructor for custom widget 'com.sap.sac.sample.echarts.sankeyyg_1.x' (kind: main)

can you please help/advice me on how to either resolve these errors or develop the charts?

entry.title: DataAction copy step
entry.content:
I’m working on a story that includes a table with a forecast for the first six months of 2024, followed by predictions for the remaining months of the year. I need to copy the data for the first six months into a table with the version "Planning." Additionally, I want to copy the forecast data for the remaining months into the same "Planning" table. If i could do that using only 1 Data Action, it would be perfect.

How can I achieve this?

entry.title: Combining 2 Dropdowns in an optimized story - SAC
entry.content:
Hey 

I have to dropdowns, one for sales org and the second for customer

in my OnInitialization the two should be filled with the members
I've tried this code:

 

var OrgVAR = Table_Demand_QTY.getDataSource().getMembers("IL_D_MNF_ORG");
for(var i=0; i<OrgVAR.length;i++){
	Dropdown_Sales_Org.addItem(OrgVAR[i].id,OrgVAR[i].description);
}
var CustomerVAR = Table_Demand_QTY.getDataSource().getMembers("IL_D_MNF_CUST");
for(var i=0; n<CustomerVAR.length;i++){
	Dropdown_Customer.addItem(CustomerVAR[i].id,CustomerVAR[i].description;
}

 

The two parts of the code work well apart.
Unfortunately, the full code gives the error "you can't use double declarations" on the second i=0 

what do I miss?

thank you

entry.title: Predicting Fixed Costs
entry.content: I’m working on a prediction table where some values are random across the months, while others are fixed. However, when I run the prediction, the fixed values also become random. Is there a way to predict all values while keeping the fixed ones unchanged?

entry.title: How to write "IF THEN ELSE" statement with BEX query Key Figure technical ID object in SAC
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to create a calculation in SAP analytics cloud on story level which is 

• IF Net Invoice Value is negative then “Credit memo”

My source is BEx query and I have a key figure in the BEx query i.e "Net Invoice Value" which I want to use in the calculated measure.

The technical id of Net Invoice Value in the BEX query is [00O2TKK8G8XRQO3VD5VBZC115]

I tried the following syntax while creating the calculated measure on a story level i.e

IF([00O2TKK8G8XRQO3VD5VBZC115] < 0, "Credit Memo", "")

but I am getting an error message below while writing this logic.

"Formula could not be computed: Object is unknown: 00O2TKK8G8XRQO3VD5VBZC115. Please complete or rewrite the formula".

I will appreciate if you let me know what is wrong with the formula and how to use BEx object in the SAC calculation which has technical ID associated with it.

Thank You very much in advance.

Regards

entry.title: Self service functionality in SAC
entry.content:
Hi,

What is the general practice followed for self service in SAC.

Is it like end users can create stories from scratch or they can copy the standard ones and modify it.

Thanks,

entry.title: Skip Datasphere Log in pop-up screen in SAC
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Is there any possibilty that we can skip Datasphere log in Pop-up screen in SAC? due to that pop-up page our reports loading duration takes longer time. We are login with SSO.

Many thanks in advance!

SAP Datasphere SAP Analytics Cloud SAP Single Sign-On

entry.title: Amortization Model in SAC
entry.content:
I am working on an amortization model for my project in SAC, and I am facing the following issue:

I have an Excel dataset with the following information:

  • Asset type (e.g., A, B, C, etc.)
  • Useful life (in months)
  • Acquisition value
  • Acquisition date
  • Start of payment date

What I would like to implement in SAC is:

  1. A table showing:
    • The start of payment date.
    • The monthly payments over the asset's useful life.
  2. For each row in the table, the monthly payment value would be calculated as:
    Acquisition value / Useful life.

Practical example:

  • Asset type: A
  • Useful life: 6 months
  • Acquisition value: 5000
  • Acquisition date: 2024-01 (January 2024)
  • Start of payment date: 2024-02 (February 2024)

In the table, the payments would appear as follows:

  • February 2024: 833.33
  • March 2024: 833.33
  • April 2024: 833.33
  • May 2024: 833.33
  • June 2024: 833.33
  • July 2024: 833.33

In other words, the total acquisition value is divided by the useful life and proportionally distributed across the corresponding months. I need help understanding how to implement this model in SAC so that the table is generated correctly.

entry.title: SAC private Open Connector
entry.content:
Hello all,

I have created a private Open Connector. My SAC instance is connected to my Open Connector account and also the BTP Account in SAC is configured.

When adding a data connection in SAC, I can see the 14 standard SAC Open Connectors (like Amazon, Microsoft Dynamics, ...). But my private Open Connector is not listed there. How can I connect SAC to my private Open Connector?

entry.title: transport SAC data between prod and dev tenets
entry.content:
hello all, 

we are working on SAC Prod tenet, evrey change directly affects the users.

we also have a DEV tenet with different url,

i want to completly copy the existing PROD data into the DEV system,

i tried exporting packages from PROD (export/import) and then importing the package in the DEV system.

there were multiple attemptes to do the import but the import fails, seldom because files "already exists and cannot be moved" 

even though i'm using "Overwrite" option.

 

is there a better way to achive this ?

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud for planning - Calender Task "partially successful"
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I've noticed a status where I'm unable to identify the failed steps in the data locking process within the calendar. Does anyone know what might be causing this step to be marked as "partially successful" rather than fully successful?

Looking forward hearing from you.

Kind regards,

Ismail

entry.title: CopyStep using Advanced Formula Step
entry.content:
Hello team,

We are trying to copy data from the Current version (months 1 to 6) to the Planning version, and data from months 7 to 12 from the Forecast version to the Planning version. However, due to the parameters requiring cardinality to be set to Single and level to Any, we cannot select multiple sourceDates.

I noticed that it might be possible to perform this CopyStep using an Advanced Copy Step, but we haven’t been able to achieve it. We tried the code in the attached screenshot but couldn’t get it to work.

Does anyone have any suggestions or advice?

Thank you!

entry.title: Max Value highlight with Cross Calculation and Calculated Measure
entry.content: I want to highlight the max value for each calculated measure from period Jan to Dec. NOTE: There are no dimensions in the table. Model is created in Datasphere. Thank you

entry.title: Getting trouble when using TUNNEL Live Connection from SAC to SAP HANA on-premise
entry.content:
Hi experts, wish you all a productive working day,
I've created a TUNNEL Live Connection from SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) to my SAP HANA on-premise. In the SAP Cloud Connector (SCC), I successfully created a Subaccount to connect from my SCC to my SAC.


Then I successfully created a Cloud to-on-premise to connect from SCC to SAP HANA.

After that, I go to SAC to create a Live Tunnel Connection to the SAP HANA but I got the error: You are not authorized to query the remote system. Please ask your administrator to grant you the InA role.

Then I went to the https://<SAC_tenant>/lcs/scc/tunnel/TUNNEL/sap/bc/ina/service/v2/GetServerInfo and got this error:

 

However, I have already granted InA privilege to the account under my SAP HANA system.

My company infrastructure:
Internet --> Company Domain(Gateway) --> Cloud Connector (inside SAP HANA on-premise server)


Best regards,

Nguyen Thanh Hieu

entry.title: how to delete a solution from prod system C4C sdk
entry.content: I want to delete a solution in the production system on c4c sdk but I can't delete it. How can I delete it? Delete button is inactive 😞

entry.title: Versioning in Analytic Data Model (SAC)
entry.content:
Hi All, 

I wanted to ask you if had a similar case or maybe you interpret guidence differently. 

I created an Analytic Data Model with Layout Measure in SAC. 

I created necessary dimensions, measures, calculations etc. 

One of the dimensions is Version. I defined this dimension, created relevant categories like Actual, Planning and Forecast. 

When the Data Model was completed, I decided to load the data via import from a file. 

I set up the import and I started preparing the data - according to documentation from SAP portal (Import and Prepare Fact Data for a Model with Measures | SAP Help Portal) I created Cateogry attribute which is relevant.

The next step was "Map to FACTS". 
I noticed that the Version was automatically mapped to default value - Actual. I removed this assignment becasue I had Version defined in file which was imported so I finished mapping - everything finished successfully. 

In step "Map properties" I was asked for Category assignment - I did it according to documentation from SAP portal. 

This step was successfull as well.

The last step was validation before Import the data.
I received this notification:

I went back to Mapping dimensions to Facts and removed mapping of the version. I assigned "default value" and I tried to validate once again. 

It worked without any notification. 

Can I understand that I cannot have more versions defined in Analytic Data Model even for Reporting purposes when I do not need planning activities? 

Perhaps I am doing something wrong that everything is fine until validation process. 
Have you had similar case? 

Versioning is very useful due to the calculations options available in the Story. Without that these options are not accessible.
I followed the information available on the SAP portal (link I shared above) but for me it's a bit misleading. 
In restriction section it's written that "There is only one Actuals in the model" and in the guide below it's mentioned that if we have multiple versions in the dataset we can assign these rows to multiple versions.

 

I would be grateful for your feedback.
Best regards,
Artur

entry.title: How to implement additional booking periods (More than 12) in SAC and Datasphere?
entry.content:
Hi all,

we are currently working on a reporting using SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere with data coming from S/4HANA. 

In S/4HANA it is possible to work with additional booking periods (More than the typical 12 month booking periods). We have the requirement to report these additional booking periods using SAP Analytics Cloud and Datasphere. As there is barely any information or blogs regarding this and no standard solution available in SAC/Datasphere, we were wondering if someone worked on a similar solution before or if there are any best practices for this kind of implementation.

Any help is much appreciated!

Best regards
